programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: Aptly known as "The Grandest Stage of Them All," WrestleMania is a global phenomenon which every WWE Superstar strives to be a part of. And in the decade of the 2000s, the stars certainly shined bright! Witness such WrestleMania classics as The Rock vs. "Stone Cold" Steve Austin, WrestleMania 16's Triangle Ladder Match, The Rock vs. Hollywood Hogan and so much more!

programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: In the 2010s, the grandest Superstars gave the WWE Universe a lifetime of memories at WrestleMania. Featuring classics such as Shawn Michaels vs. the Undertaker, The Rise of Kofi-Mania, Seth "Freakin" Rollins' revolutionary moments at WrestleMania 31, and Ronda Rousey's debut with The Rock... this decade truly was a showcase of the immortals.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: A deceased tycoon's unit goes up for sale; antique kitchen gear; soaring highs and crushing lows greet the bidders.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: A stranger on a motorcycle drives up prices in the city of DeSoto, where only four lockers are up for grabs; Ricky and Bubba hope to sweep the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Laura takes the reigns alone in Fullerton and proceeds to outsell Dan; Brandi gets assaulted by her locker, but drives home a winner; Rene postpones a day date in favor of a work date; Darrell stumbles across an unexpected collection.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders look for bargains in Lancaster, Calif.; Jarrod's cocky attitude annoys Brandi; Darrell gets in touch with his feminine side.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon revisit the scene of their greatest triumph; Jarrod and Brandi are introduced to a "Herbmeister"; Rene and Casey land a sweet score.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy races against time to win a locker and get home; Rene outspends the competition, but Darrell and Brandon manage to come out ahead.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Victorville, a friendly duel runs Dusty up, but his vinyl might save him; Ivy's locker shines some light on the business; Lisa learns that she needs her locker about as much as she needs a hole in her head.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy is on the warpath in Lancaster, doing his best to intimidate the other buyers, and he won't be losing any sleep over it; Brandi begrudgingly lets Bozek decide which locker they buy; Dusty goes up against the King to prove a point.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: With Arizona having some of the loosest gun laws in the country, sheriff's deputies in Pima County constantly confront armed suspects; Deputy Reed deals with a pistol-packing argument at a supermarket checkout line, and Deputy Carter is called to a suspected armed home invasion.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In Pima County, Arizona, the blistering desert heat leaves tempers short and drivers on edge; Deputy Pool arrests an alleged DUI speeder with kids in the car, while Deputy McCall-Miller pulls over a driver who's in possession of a Bowie knife and a pocket full of meth.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: In Pima County, Ariz., the Sheriff's Department fights crime at night; Detective McLeod pursues a hit-and-run driver while Deputy Stewart encounters couples in parked cars.

programme.title: Desert Law
programme.desc: The burning summer is finally ending in Pima County, Ariz., but crime doesn't stop; Detective McLeod responds to an attempted abduction, Deputy McCall-Miller stops out with a drunk driver who refuses to admit he's crashed into a utility pole.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Richland, officers capture suspected drugs tossed from a car window; in Montana, officers come across donuts but no coffee; in Nye County, a wanted man seems impressed with his own arrest.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a suspected stolen vehicle leads officers on a massive chase; in Richland, officers assist a stranded motorist; they are interrupted by a report of an alleged home invasion.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Nye County, officers pursue an ATV in a bumpy chase; in East Providence, a motorist who was allegedly robbed decides to take justice into his own hands; in Lawrence, officers respond to a report of a suspected aggressive pig on the loose.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Missoula County, animal control steps in to help two bucks whose antlers have become tangled; in Lafayette, a car full of partygoers turns a traffic stop into an impromptu disco. In Lawrence, K9 Axel demonstrates his skills in the field.
